message:
refactor: Migrate UI from ui.html to bio_nc_ui.html for clearer naming

Renames the web chat interface HTML file to align with project naming
conventions and improve clarity when working across multiple nanochat variants.

Changes:
- bio_inspired_nanochat/ui.html → bio_inspired_nanochat/bio_nc_ui.html
- Updated path reference in chat_web.py to reflect new filename

Rationale:
- "bio_nc_ui.html" clearly indicates this is the Bio-Inspired Nanochat UI
- Prevents confusion when comparing with upstream nanochat or other forks
- Maintains consistency with package naming (bio_inspired_nanochat)
- No functional changes to the UI itself

The HTML content remains identical; this is purely an organizational rename
to improve developer experience when navigating the codebase.

🧠 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
